promptTemplates.label: claude
promptTemplates.text: Read MULTI_BRAIN_PROTOCOL.md. You are the architecture brain for LUMIAION. Audit the current folder structure and propose the next clean block to build.

promptTemplates.label: codex
promptTemplates.text: Read AGENTS.md and MULTI_BRAIN_PROTOCOL.md. Audit this repo for structure, broken files, missing README logic, and unsafe Git issues. Do not modify files yet. Report first.

promptTemplates.label: gemini
promptTemplates.text: Read GEMINI.md and MULTI_BRAIN_PROTOCOL.md. Give a second-opinion architecture review of this repo. Identify contradictions, missing foundations, and what should be built next.
